description.from: Restores HP of the 4 allies with the lowest HP by 10% of Max HP, and additionally restores 100*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 16.1% ATK HP every 1sec for 10sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.
description.to: Restores HP equal to 10% of Max HP to the 4 allies with the lowest HP, and additionally restores 108*(1+0.3Skill Level)+67.5% of Attack Power HP every 0.5 sec for 5 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.from: Removes all negative effects from all allies and increases their M.DEF by 101*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) for 15sec.
description.to: Removes harmful effects from all allies and increases their Magic Defense by 50(1+0.3Skill Level) for 6 sec.

description.from: Deals 88*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+55.8% ATK Magic DMG to enemies within range 10 time, and reduces their ATK Spd by 10% for 10sec.
description.to: Deals 88(1+0.3Skill Level)+55.8% of Attack Power as Magic Damage to enemies within range 10 time(s), and reduces their Attack Speed by 25% for 10 sec.

description.from: Every 8sec, restores 1000 Mana and 2208*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 358.4% ATK HP to 1 ally with the lowest HP.
description.to: Every 7 sec, restores 1000 Mana and 264(1+0.3Skill Level)+165.3% of Attack Power HP to 1 ally with the lowest HP.

IV.from: Increases Mana Recovery per sec of the target by 15%.
IV.to: Increases Mana Recovery per sec of the target by 50%.

IV.from: Increases CC Resist by 120 for 15 sec.
IV.to: Increases CC Resist by 300 for 6 sec.

dark.to: Magic Defense is additionally increased by 13%.

light.from: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 10%.
light.to: Magic Damage taken by the target is increased by 25%.

dark.from: Increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 10%.
dark.to: Physical Damage taken by the target is increased by 25%.

dark.from: All allies’ Mana recovery per second increases by 30%, and your cooldown of all skills is reduced by 5%.
dark.to: On hit, has a 10% chance to reduce all of the target's Defense by 20% and reduce the cooldown of all your skills by 5%.

description.from: Every 20 sec, puts the 2 allies with the lowest HP into Spirit Form for {0} sec. Allies in Spirit Form are immune to physical attacks, their HP cannot be reduced below 1%, and their Mana recovery per second increases by 35%.
description.to: Every 20 sec, puts the 2 allies with the lowest HP into Spirit Form for {0} sec. Allies in Spirit Form are immune to physical attacks, their HP cannot be reduced below 1%, and their Mana recovery per second is increased by 50%.
